name: Freshdesk
one_liner: Cloud helpdesk/customer-support ticketing platform with a full-featured v2 REST API for tickets, contacts, agents, companies, and knowledge base.
primary_auth: API key (used as username in HTTP Basic Auth, with any non-empty string such as 'X' as the password)
access_notes: Any Freshdesk account (including the free plan and the self-serve 14-day trial) exposes a per-agent API key in Profile Settings that immediately works against https://<domain>.freshdesk.com/api/v2. No human approval or payment required to obtain working credentials.
api_notes: v2 REST API covers Tickets, Conversations, Contacts, Agents, Companies, Groups, Skills, Time Entries, Products, Email Mailboxes, Custom Objects, Solutions (KB articles/categories/folders), Automations, and Scenario Automations. Full CRUD across many resources puts it around 100+ operations. Rate limits vary by plan (~3,000-5,000 calls/hour).
mcp_notes: Freshworks ships an official MCP server for Freshdesk, but it is currently in Beta via an Early Access Program limited to Enterprise-plan customers (request access through a technical account manager or support@freshdesk.com). A popular community MCP server also exists (effytech/freshdesk_mcp, MIT, published on PyPI as freshdesk-mcp).
main_blocker: None for core build: public REST API with self-serve API keys on free/trial accounts. Only caveat is the awkward Basic-auth convention (API key as username) and per-plan rate limits.

evidence.claim: v2 REST API uses the personal API key as the Basic Auth username with 'X' as password; endpoint is https://<domain>.freshdesk.com/api/v2
API key is found in Profile Settings via the 'View API key' option for each agent
API covers tickets, contacts, agents, companies, conversations, solutions/KB, automations; rate limits 3,000-5,000 calls/hour by plan
Freshworks MCP integration is in Beta via Early Access Program for selected Enterprise-plan customers; request access via TAM or support
Community MCP server effytech/freshdesk_mcp exposes Freshdesk ticket/agent/contact/company operations (MIT licensed)

open_questions: Exact operation count is estimated. The official Freshworks MCP is EAP/Enterprise-gated, so its general availability terms are not yet public.
